description: Configuration for spatial relationship metrics calculation in StructureRelations

slice_thickness.description: Default slice thickness for volume/surface calculations if not available from DICOM

enabled_metrics.description: Which metric categories to calculate by default. Individual calculators check applicability to relationship type.

margin_settings.description: Settings for margin calculations (CONTAINS, SURROUNDS, SHELTERS)

volume_settings.description: Settings for volume overlap calculations (OVERLAPS, PARTITION, CONTAINS, EQUAL)

ratio_basis_options.auto: Use relationship-appropriate denominator (larger for PARTITION, average for OVERLAPS)
ratio_basis_options.average: Ratio relative to average of both structures

surface_settings.description: Settings for surface overlap calculations (BORDERS, CONFINES)

multi_region_handling.description: How to handle structures with multiple disconnected regions

non_applicable_handling.description: How to represent metrics that don't apply to a relationship type
